red_lines: Trade imbalances perceived as unfair to US
core_narratives: Unfair trade deals harming American workers

decision_history.event_description: Imposed sweeping tariffs on Chinese imports and global trading partners
decision_history.decision_taken: Enacted broad tariff regime including 145% on Chinese goods, 25% on many other nations, framing as reciprocal trade policy
decision_history.outcome: Significant market volatility, trade tensions, some bilateral negotiations initiated

decision_history.event_description: Withdrew from Paris Climate Agreement again upon taking office
decision_history.decision_taken: Signed executive order withdrawing US from Paris Agreement, rolled back environmental regulations
decision_history.outcome: International criticism, energy sector deregulation accelerated

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Republican base, rural voters, evangelical Christians, working class whites

military_posture.force_disposition: global power projection with focus on Indo-Pacific
